## ♻️ Refactor: [Title]
Logic changes with the same output using a different approach.

### 📝 Description
Refactoring [specific logic] to improve readability/maintainability.

### 🛠️ Changes Details

### ✅ Verification

- [ ] Changes do not affect business logic or features.
